title: TESLA HOME — 'Sara… thank you for going first.'
prompt: Wide back-seat-POV shot in @tesla-interior — looking forward between the two front seats. @Papa is in the FRONT-LEFT driver's seat, hands on the minimalist steering wheel, glancing softly in the rearview at his daughters. @Sara in the BACK-LEFT pink booster seat. @Eva in the BACK-RIGHT purple booster seat, holding her shiny gold @dental-coin in both hands like a treasure, looking down at it. The big horizontal center touchscreen glows with a route line. Soft warm afternoon light pours through the panoramic glass roof. Eva turns her head slowly to look at Sara, voice small and full of feeling: "Sara… thank you for going first." Sara (looking back at Eva, soft proud smile): "Sisters first." Papa (eyes a little glassy in the rearview, gentle smile): "Best customers EVER." A quiet emotional payoff beat — no shouting, no comedy, just sisters.
